A

addObserver(Observer) - Method in interface edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentService
Adds an observer to the system.
addObserver(Observer) - Method in class edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentServiceImpl
Adds an observer to the notification list.
adminCancelAppointment(String) - Method in interface edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentService
Allows the administrator to cancel an appointment.
adminCancelAppointment(String) - Method in class edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentServiceImpl
Allows the administrator to cancel an appointment.
Administrator - Class in edu.najah.software.domain
Represents an administrator in the system.
Administrator(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class edu.najah.software.domain.Administrator
Constructs a new Administrator object.
adminModifyAppointment(String, LocalDateTime) - Method in interface edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentService
Allows the administrator to modify an appointment.
adminModifyAppointment(String, LocalDateTime) - Method in class edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentServiceImpl
Allows the administrator to modify an appointment.
AISummaryService - Class in edu.najah.software.ai
 
AISummaryService() - Constructor for class edu.najah.software.ai.AISummaryService
 
App - Class in edu.najah.software
Main application class for running the appointment booking system.
App() - Constructor for class edu.najah.software.App
 
Appointment - Class in edu.najah.software.domain
Represents an appointment in the system.
Appointment(String, LocalDateTime, int, int) - Constructor for class edu.najah.software.domain.Appointment
Constructs a new appointment without specifying a type.
Appointment(String, LocalDateTime, int, int, AppointmentType) - Constructor for class edu.najah.software.domain.Appointment
Constructs a new appointment with a specific type.
AppointmentGUI - Class in edu.najah.software.gui
Supports two roles Admin (full access) and User (limited access) After login automatically navigates to Available Slots Admin username: admin password: admin123 User username: user password: user123
AppointmentGUI() - Constructor for class edu.najah.software.gui.AppointmentGUI
 
AppointmentRepository - Interface in edu.najah.software.repository
Repository interface for managing appointments.
AppointmentService - Interface in edu.najah.software.service
Interface for appointment management operations.
AppointmentServiceImpl - Class in edu.najah.software.service
Implementation of the AppointmentService interface.
AppointmentServiceImpl(AppointmentRepository, AuthService) - Constructor for class edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentServiceImpl
Constructs an AppointmentServiceImpl object.
AppointmentType - Enum Class in edu.najah.software.domain.appointmenttype
Enum representing all supported appointment types
AppointmentTypeRule - Interface in edu.najah.software.domain.appointmenttype
Interface for type specific booking rules Each appointment type has its own rule implementation
ASSESSMENT - Enum constant in enum class edu.najah.software.domain.appointmenttype.AppointmentType
 
AssessmentAppointmentRule - Class in edu.najah.software.domain.appointmenttype
Rule for assessment appointments Max duration 120 minutes, max 3 participants
AssessmentAppointmentRule() - Constructor for class edu.najah.software.domain.appointmenttype.AssessmentAppointmentRule
 
AuthService - Interface in edu.najah.software.service
Interface for authentication operations.

B

bookAppointment(String, LocalDateTime, int, int) - Method in interface edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentService
Books a new appointment without specifying a type.
bookAppointment(String, LocalDateTime, int, int) - Method in class edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentServiceImpl
Books a new appointment without specifying a type.
bookAppointment(String, LocalDateTime, int, int, AppointmentType) - Method in interface edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentService
Books a new appointment with a specific type.
bookAppointment(String, LocalDateTime, int, int, AppointmentType) - Method in class edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentServiceImpl
Books a new appointment with a type.
BookingRuleStrategy - Interface in edu.najah.software.strategy
A simple interface that every booking rule must follow We use this so we can add new rules later without touching the booking logic Each rule just needs to say whether an appointment is valid or not

C

cancelAppointment(String) - Method in interface edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentService
Cancels an appointment.
cancelAppointment(String) - Method in class edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentServiceImpl
Cancels an upcoming appointment.

D

DurationRule - Class in edu.najah.software.strategy
Makes sure no appointment lasts longer than 2 hours Anything over 120 minutes gets rejected
DurationRule() - Constructor for class edu.najah.software.strategy.DurationRule

generateSummary(List<Appointment>) - Method in class edu.najah.software.ai.AISummaryService
Sends the current list of appointments to Groq AI and gets back a professional summary and analysis report.

Checks whether the current logged-in user is an administrator.

isValid(Appointment) - Method in interface edu.najah.software.strategy.BookingRuleStrategy

isValid(Appointment) - Method in class edu.najah.software.strategy.DurationRule
Checks if the appointment duration is within the allowed limit
isValid(Appointment) - Method in class edu.najah.software.strategy.ParticipantLimitRule
Checks if the number of participants is within the allowed limit

L

login(String, String) - Method in interface edu.najah.software.service.AuthService
Authenticates a user using a username and password.
login(String, String) - Method in class edu.najah.software.service.SimpleAuthService
Authenticates a user using predefined credentials.
logout() - Method in interface edu.najah.software.service.AuthService
Logs out the currently authenticated user.
logout() - Method in class edu.najah.software.service.SimpleAuthService
Logs out the currently authenticated user and clears role information.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class edu.najah.software.App
Main method of the application.
main(String[]) - Static method in class edu.najah.software.gui.AppointmentGUI
 
modifyAppointment(String, LocalDateTime) - Method in interface edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentService
Modifies the appointment date and time.
modifyAppointment(String, LocalDateTime) - Method in class edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentServiceImpl
Modifies an appointment date and time.

N

NotificationObserver - Class in edu.najah.software.observer
This is the observer that actually does something when notified It receives the event and passes it to the NotificationService to handle the sending This way we keep the what happened separate from how we tell people
NotificationObserver(NotificationService) - Constructor for class edu.najah.software.observer.NotificationObserver
Creates a new observer with a notification service to use Passing it in like this makes it easy to swap or mock in tests
NotificationService - Interface in edu.najah.software.observer
Defines how notifications get sent out.

O

Observer - Interface in edu.najah.software.observer
Anyone who wants to receive appointment notifications must implement this it is like subscribing to updates, when something happens everyone on the list gets the message

P

ParticipantLimitRule - Class in edu.najah.software.strategy
Makes sure no appointment has more than 5 participants If someone tries to book with 6 or more people, we reject it
ParticipantLimitRule() - Constructor for class edu.najah.software.strategy.ParticipantLimitRule
 

R

removeObserver(Observer) - Method in interface edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentService
Removes an observer from the system.
removeObserver(Observer) - Method in class edu.najah.software.service.AppointmentServiceImpl
Removes an observer from the notification list.

U

update(Appointment, String) - Method in class edu.najah.software.observer.NotificationObserver
Called when an appointment event happens Just forwards everything to the notification service
update(Appointment, String) - Method in interface edu.najah.software.observer.Observer
Gets called automatically when an appointment event happens
